global_unsubscribe.rule: Never email customers on the global unsubscribe list under any circumstances.
global_unsubscribe.check: Call get_suppressions() and filter out any customer with scope: 'global' before any send.

email_fatigue_guard.rule: No more than 1 campaign email per customer per 3-day rolling window.
email_fatigue_guard.check: Exclude customers who received any campaign email in the last 3 days. Behavioral trigger emails (cart abandon, winback) are exempt from this guard.

post_purchase_suppression.rule: Add customer to campaign-scoped suppression after they purchase via the campaign. Suppression expires after 30 days.
post_purchase_suppression.check: Check for campaign-scoped suppression record before sending Day-3 and Day-7 follow-ups.

winback_cooldown.rule: 60-day cooldown between winback emails per customer. Never send a second winback email within this window.
winback_cooldown.check: Check last winback send date for customer before triggering. Call is_suppressed() before each winback trigger.

campaign_scoped_suppression.rule: Customers who purchased a campaign SKU at full price in the last 60 days are excluded from promotional campaigns for that SKU.
campaign_scoped_suppression.check: For promotion-type campaigns: exclude customers whose last purchase of the featured SKU was at full price within 60 days.

invalid_email_filter.rule: Never send to customers where email_valid == false.
invalid_email_filter.check: Always filter out email_valid: false records before resolving target audience.

seasonal.post_purchase_suppression: DISABLED — seasonal campaigns use gift framing, not personal purchase targeting. A buyer may intend to buy again for a different recipient.

winback.send_limit: Single send only per customer per 60-day window. Never queue a second winback.
winback.fatigue_guard: Standard guard applies but winback sends count toward it

limited_allocation.auto_cancel: Auto-cancel all queued sends when inventory for the SKU depletes to 0.

educational.post_purchase_suppression: DISABLED — educational content is not purchase-triggered

trigger_email_exemptions.cart_abandon: Exempt from 3-day fatigue guard. Fire if > 45 minutes since abandon and customer has not yet purchased.
trigger_email_exemptions.browse_abandon: Exempt from 3-day fatigue guard. Fire if customer viewed PDP 3+ times in 7 days with no purchase.
trigger_email_exemptions.winback_trigger: Subject to 60-day winback cooldown. Not exempt from global unsubscribe.
